calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-13-2027 Off Calendar
TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR
EXAMINER: EDWARD MIYAUCHI

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 22, 2005, is admitted to probate. Kathleen Melee is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for March 10, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Continued To Aug-27-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-21-2025 Continued To Aug-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
